zh.Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯布雷康史爾可利可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Brim de Turberville of Crucywel於大約1180年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾可利可維爾。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1281年享年102歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Brim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Brim de Turberville of Crucywel was born about 1180, in Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1281, at the age of 102.

fr.Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales: Crickhowell, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Brim de Turberville of Crucywel est né environ 1180, à Crickhowell, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1281, à l’âge de 102 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Brim de Turberville of Crucywel wurde um 1180 in Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1281 im Alter von 102 Jahren.
